response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang background, but the resume shows no evidence of the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese, embedded firmware development in C for UNIX, Linux kernel source modification, or networking-security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3 switching). C/C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no embedded, networking, or chip-vendor SDK experience.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with TDD and craftsmanship focus
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Comfortable across multiple languages and able to read English technical documentation
concerns: No indication of native-level Japanese proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network-security (MACsec/802.1X/L2-L3) experience
No Linux kernel investigation or source-code modification experience

key_factors.factor: Minimal recent C/UNIX and no Linux kernel work
